did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a comprehensive overview and literature review of melanoma detection methods. It discusses and summarizes existing AI/ML techniques (such as CNNs, ANNs, SVMs) and datasets from other studies but does not perform original experiments or use AI to obtain new study results itself.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
